rooms.name: The Alchemist's Study
rooms.description: A dimly lit room filled with dusty bottles and strange apparatus. A mechanical door with a crank slot blocks the only exit. A pedestal with runes sits in the corner.

rooms.name: Freedom
rooms.description: You've escaped! Daylight floods through the open archway ahead.

items.name: brass gear
items.description: A small brass gear with fine teeth. It looks like part of a mechanism.

items.name: wooden shaft
items.description: A smooth wooden shaft with a notch at one end. It could fit into a gear.

items.name: ornate key
items.description: A decorated golden key with intricate engravings. It seems too fancy for this dusty room.

items.name: hand crank
items.description: A hand crank assembled from a brass gear and a wooden shaft. It fits perfectly into mechanism slots.

items.name: crystal orb
items.description: A translucent orb that glows faintly when touched. It seems drawn to the rune pedestal.

items.name: ancient scroll
items.description: A brittle scroll covered in symbols. It doesn't seem useful for any puzzle here.

items.name: copper coil
items.description: A coiled piece of copper wire. It looks like it could conduct electricity but there's no power source.

puzzles.name: rune pedestal
puzzles.description: The pedestal has a circular indentation that glows faintly. Something round needs to be placed here.

puzzles.name: mechanical door
puzzles.description: The door has a crank slot. You need a hand crank to open it.
